overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through rural countryside at night. The journey progresses from dense forested areas through ancient stone-walled fields toward a distant village settlement with lights visible on the horizon.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the narrow forest path with two swords on his back

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the forest
thick bushes and undergrowth lining the path
tall pine trees surrounding the trail

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt path through a dense forest at night. The trail is flanked by thick vegetation and tall trees, creating an enclosed feeling with limited sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural trail with ancient stone walls

events.description: stone walls appear along both sides of the path as the forest opens into countryside

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the path through the stone-walled rural landscape

entered.detail: ancient stone walls lining the path sides
open grassy fields extending into the distance

segments.scene_description: The forest gives way to open countryside with ancient stone walls lining the path. The terrain becomes more open with grassy fields visible under the night sky, and the dense forest vegetation falls away behind.

events.description: distant village with warm lights becomes visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking toward the distant settlement, approaching a potential encounter

notable_agents.action: group of red-clad figures standing near the village entrance in the distance

entered.detail: settlement with glowing lights visible on the horizon
crumbling stone structures alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The path opens into wide grasslands with stone ruins scattered alongside. A distant village with warm lights appears on the horizon, and red-clad figures can be seen near the settlement entrance as Geralt approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic nocturnal forest that gradually opens into a wide, moonlit countryside. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt path enclosed by thick vegetation and towering trees that obscure the night sky. As the trail progresses, the dense forest falls away, giving way to an open landscape where ancient stone walls line the path and grassy fields expand on either side. The scene then shifts into wide grasslands scattered with stone ruins before finally revealing a distant village on the horizon, where warm lights and red-clad figures mark the destination.
